title: Segmentation Label Schema
text: NIfTI labels must use the approved label IDs. CT and Mask shape, direction, origin and spacing must be consistent before inference or planning.

title: Puncture Path Planning Rules
section: Needle length, angle and safety envelope
text: Candidate paths are filtered by needle length and insertion angle. The complete needle path is expanded by the configured safety radius and rejected when the safety envelope intersects a danger-organ Mask.

title: Puncture Path Planning Rules
text: This version contains deprecated path planning constraints and must only be returned when version v2 is explicitly requested.

title: Intraoperative Safety Evaluation
section: Skin penetration and warning stop boundaries
text: Skin penetration is verified by 3D ray sampling from the planned entry point to the current needle tip. A zero tip label alone cannot determine penetration. Warning and stop regions are generated from danger-structure Masks.

title: TensorRT Segmentation Inference Interface
text: The C++ TensorRT adapter accepts a registered CT artifact and model version, and returns segmentation artifact references, latency metrics and structured errors.
